events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the line/load reversal on the GFCI is flagged as a **fail** (high risk) — either the device locks out and won't reset (newer UL 943 units with miswire protection), or it appears to function while leaving downstream receptacles unprotected and load terminals potentially energized when tripped (older units). Corrective action is de-energize, verify feed vs. downstream conductors, re-terminate LINE/LOAD correctly, and retest with the built-in test button plus a plug-in GFCI tester before restoring service.
